title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: Do you think there is too much pressure on people to eat healthily?
How much attention do you pay to the nutritional content of what you eat?
Has your diet changed much in recent years? Why?
What changes would you recommend to improve people's diets in your country?
Do you think schools do enough to promote healthy eating habits?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think governments should do more to regulate junk food advertising?
Is personal responsibility or government policy more effective in improving public health?
What do you think is the biggest obstacle to people adopting a healthier diet?
